Package egovframework.let.uss.olh.qna.service

Class QnaManageVO

java.lang.Object

egovframework.let.uss.olh.qna.service.QnaManageVO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class QnaManageVO extends QnaManageDefaultVO
